chapters.title: Types of Attacks and Malicious Software

allowed: Textbook, personal notes, lab documentation, Kali VM, John the Ripper, Hashcat
tips: Review Labs 4.1–4.3 including your password-cracking results from both clients
Know the difference between NTLM and salted Linux hashes — and why it matters
Understand the major social-engineering attack types and how OSINT enables them
timeManagement: Budget ~90 seconds per question. Timer starts on click and cannot be paused.
readyMessage: Make sure you have a stable connection and 45 uninterrupted minutes.
